# MicOff

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MicOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MicOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
record, sound, mute, microphone

## Categories
devices, communication, connectivity, multimedia

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/mic-off)
